inputs.label: Point Number
inputs.businessContext: The point established on the come-out roll (4,5,6,8,9,10).

businessContext_i18n.en: The point established on the come-out roll (4,5,6,8,9,10).
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Punkt, der beim Come-out-Wurf festgelegt wird (4,5,6,8,9,10).

inputs.label: Number of Rolls
inputs.businessContext: Number of dice rolls to simulate or calculate probability for.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of dice rolls to simulate or calculate probability for.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Simüle edilecek veya olasılığı hesaplanacak zar atışı sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Würfelwürfe zur Simulation oder Wahrscheinlichkeitsberechnung.

inputs.label: Bet Amount
inputs.businessContext: Amount wagered on the pass line or point.

businessContext_i18n.en: Amount wagered on the pass line or point.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Pass line veya noktaya yatırılan miktar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Betrag, der auf die Pass-Linie oder den Punkt gesetzt wird.

inputs.label: Payout Odds (e.g., 2 for 2:1)
inputs.businessContext: Payout multiplier for winning bet (e.g., 1 for even money, 2 for 2:1).

businessContext_i18n.en: Payout multiplier for winning bet (e.g., 1 for even money, 2 for 2:1).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kazanan bahis için ödeme çarpanı (örn. eşit para için 1, 2:1 için 2).
businessContext_i18n.de: Auszahlungsmultiplikator für einen Gewinn (z.B. 1 für gerade Quoten, 2 für 2:1).
